capabilities_used.evidence: [2024-05-29] 直接写“$BTC AT NEAR-TERM SUPPORT (SMA20)”。图 4、图 7 都是在上升结构里盯均线回踩后的延续，而不是追远离均线的扩张。
[2026-04-07] “We're below SMA200 (95.2k) & SMA50 (88.9k), so bearish trend conditions.” 他把价格相对 50/200 均线的位置当作趋势切换条件；图 8 也是典型收复关键位后看上行延续。
图 4 明确画出 FLOKI 的水平箱体上下沿，图 7 也把 BTC 放在矩形整理区里处理；[2025-06-30] “The longer the consolidation, the bigger the breakout” 说明他反复用盘整-突破框架。
图 7 在箱体下沿假跌破后直接标注“OVERTHROW”，这是非常典型的扫流动性/扫止损后收回再上行。
[2024-05-28] “$BTC RALLY FAILED AT $72K”; [2024-07-29] “$BTC magical $70,000 resistance rejected, again👀”。他经常强调关键位失败突破，而不是默认真突破。
图 4、图 7 都是先定义区间边界，再围绕边界做判断；不是复杂指标堆叠，而是靠箱体上沿/下沿的反应交易。
图 2 的 BTC 周线在上升均线之上，配合 [2024-12-31] “2025 is here! Manifesting $BTC $225,000+” 和多次“Higher for longer”，他对强势上升趋势有明显顺势做多偏好。
[2026-04-07] 明确给出“below SMA200 & SMA50, so bearish trend conditions”，说明他也会用简单客观条件定义空头环境，而不是永远无脑看多。
[2024-04-30] “New ETFs boost demand (+$237B Vol ttl)”; [2025-06-28] “New ATH: Total Spot Bitcoin ETF AUM @ $142.29B”。他把 ETF 资金/规模当作 BTC 上涨的需求代理变量。
[2025-06-28] “there was a golden SMA50/200 crossover...” 说明他会把 50/200 均线金叉当作中长期趋势确认。
[2024-11-30] “Altcoin Season Is 68% Ready!”；[2026-04-11] “Altcoins are about to explode.” 他明显在做 BTC 主导到山寨扩散的轮动判断。
[2024-02-29] “Best strategy? Long winners, cut losers.”；[2026-04-04] “Stop losses are the last line of defense.” 虽然整体风格偏激进，但口头框架里反复强调止损纪律。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Box Consolidation Breakout
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Define a horizontal trading box, wait for prolonged compression, then trade either the reclaim after a false break or the expansion through the box edge. Target is typically the box height or the next major resistance.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 先定义水平箱体，等待足够长的压缩整理，再交易假跌破后的收回，或箱体边缘突破后的扩张。目标通常是箱体高度或下一关键阻力位。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图 4、图 7 都是标准箱体；[2025-06-30] “The longer the consolidation, the bigger the breakout.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: BTC Seasonality Calendar
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use month-by-month and quarter-by-quarter historical BTC seasonality as a directional prior, especially when current structure is neutral and the trader wants to lean bullish or cautious.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用 BTC 历史月度/季度季节性作为方向先验，尤其是在当前结构中性时，用来决定偏多还是偏谨慎。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-05-28] “JUNE-JULY BULL SEASON AHEAD”; [2025-06-30] “July: typically bullish”; [2026-03-31] “April up 10/15 times; +18.93% avg. gain.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Altseason Breadth Trigger
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Track breadth across top alts versus BTC rather than relying only on BTC dominance; when enough large-cap alts outperform together, treat it as altseason ignition.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 不只看 BTC.D，而是跟踪主流山寨相对 BTC 的广度表现；当足够多的大市值山寨同步跑赢 BTC，就视为山寨季启动信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2024-11-30] “Altcoin Season Is 68% Ready! Momentum and breadth building up.” 这比单纯 BTC.D 切换更接近广度框架。

personal_quirks.quote: Best strategy? Long winners, cut losers.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 顺着盈利头寸加码或持有，亏损头寸快速处理，不做均摊亏损。

personal_quirks.quote: The only way not to make any money in this market is by ignoring facts. Stop ignoring facts.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 优先服从客观市场证据，不要被情绪、立场或叙事绑架。

personal_quirks.quote: The greatest amount of cognitive dissonance is experienced during the early stages of a reversal. Bookmark these words
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 真正的反转初期通常最不舒服、最不被相信，不能等到所有人认同才行动。

personal_quirks.quote: The longer the consolidation, the bigger the breakout
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 盘整时间越长，后续波动释放越大，重点寻找压缩后的方向选择。

personal_quirks.quote: Stop losses are the last line of defense. The real trading starts before you even open the platform.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 风险管理先于下单，止损只是最后一道保护，不是全部风控。

unique_traits: 他的图表语言非常简化，核心就是箱体、关键水平位、50/200 均线、假突破/收回，没有复杂因子堆叠。与很多纯 TA 交易员不同，他会把季节性统计、ETF 资金流、山寨季叙事和强烈的内容营销混在一起，形成高传播性的“看多模板”。整体上他更像一个强方向性的 swing 型 BTC/山寨牛市布道者，而不是中性、系统化的双向交易员。

high_conviction_phrases: This year you can retire your family. Lock in
